title: Compress PDF for Gmail — Under 25 MB Attachment Limit | VeloTools
description: Compress PDF files to fit Gmail's 25 MB attachment limit. Pre-configured Web preset in your browser — no upload.
heroLead: Gmail blocks attachments over 25 MB. This page opens the compressor pre-tuned for email-sized PDFs and warns you if output still exceeds the limit.

widget.limitWarning: Still over 25 MB — try Screen preset or split the PDF first.

intentBanner: Gmail mode: Web preset (96 DPI · 65% JPEG) · 25 MB limit checker enabled

title: Compress PDF for Canvas LMS — Under 5 MB Upload | VeloTools
description: Shrink PDF assignments to fit Canvas LMS 5 MB upload limits. Screen preset applied automatically in your browser.
heroLead: Canvas courses often cap assignment files at 5 MB. The tool starts in Screen preset (72 DPI) and flags files that still exceed the portal limit.

widget.limitWarning: Still over 5 MB — remove scanned color pages or split into multiple files.

intentBanner: Canvas mode: Screen preset (72 DPI · 40% JPEG) · 5 MB limit checker enabled
